JUDGE DONALDSON, DPADILLA-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK 2:20PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; CASE SETTLED; STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: REST OF PREMISES AT 239 23RD AVE, SF, CA 94124; DEFT AGREES TO VACATE PREMISES ON/BEF 12 NOON ON 2/3/99, LEAVING PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN COND DEFT AGREES TO RETURN ALL KEYS ON/BEF 2/3/99 TO PLTF ATTY OR AGENT W/NOTE CONFIRMING VOLUNTARY LEAVING; PLTF AGREES TO WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AND RENT THRU 2/3/99 DEFT AGREES TO PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $300. FOR PG&E BILLS COMMENCING ON 3/5/99 AT $50P/MO UNTIL PAID IN FULL; IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY W/STIP PLTF ENTITLED TO REASONABLE ATTY FEES AND COSTS; NO OTHER OCCUPANT ANY PERSONAL PROP LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; IF FAILS TO VACATED PLTF ENTITLED TO JUDGMT IN THE AMT OF $4800. AND IMMED WRIT OF POSSESSION W/24HRS NOT. DEFT NOT ENTITLED TO ANY FURTHER STYS; IF DEFT VACTS PREMISES, PLTF SHALL ENTER DISM; PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULATION
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
